name: Razorpay Payment — Testcontainers Integration Suite
scenario: Razorpay's payment service has 400 passing H2 tests, but 3 production bugs slipped through: JSONB type mismatch, ON CONFLICT syntax failure, and Redis TTL not behaving as expected. Migrate the critical integration tests to Testcontainers with real PostgreSQL and Redis.

core.description: PostgreSQLContainer static @Container + @Testcontainers at class level. @DynamicPropertySource: url, username, password. @AutoConfigureTestDatabase(replace=NONE) to prevent H2 substitution.
Payment entity with JSONB metadata field (@Column(columnDefinition='jsonb')). PaymentRepository: findByMerchantId, findByStatus, sumByMerchant (JPQL SUM).
Redis GenericContainer static. @DynamicPropertySource: host + getMappedPort(6379). Redis tests: set/get, TTL expiry (1s TTL + 2s sleep + assertNull).
Abstract base class PostgresRedisTestBase with both static containers and shared @DynamicPropertySource. At least 2 test classes extend it.
@BeforeEach: repo.deleteAll() + redis.flushAll(). Ensures test isolation without restarting containers.
@SpringBootTest (5 tests): DB save+find, JSONB valid JSON saves, findByMerchant count correct, Redis cache hit, Redis TTL expires. All 5 pass.
README: table comparing H2 vs Testcontainers (pros/cons, speed, accuracy, use cases).

bonus.description: KafkaContainer integration: producer sends PaymentCreatedEvent, consumer receives it within 10 seconds. CountDownLatch for async waiting.
ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE (upsert) native query — test proves it works with PostgreSQL (fails on H2). UpsertRepository with custom native query.
GitHub Actions workflow YAML (.github/workflows/integration-tests.yml) with ubuntu-latest, Java 21, maven verify with IT profile.

ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. @AutoConfigureTestDatabase(replace=NONE) with @DataJpaTest: critical — without this, Spring replaces the datasource with H2 even though you configured a container. @DynamicPropertySource must be static: Spring calls it before application context loads, so non-static methods are not accessible. getMappedPort(6379): Testcontainers maps container ports to random host ports — never hardcode 6379 for the host port. @BeforeEach TRUNCATE or deleteAll(): much faster than restarting the container — containers should be static and shared. TTL test: use at least 1s TTL and 2s sleep — smaller values are flaky on CI due to timing variations.
